surface: plan §10 S1 / §10.3 (#740 H3): a well-formed plan whose task status was flipped to 'merged' and job_acceptance.status to 'passed' on disk. Status is OUTSIDE the immutable-identity hash (advisory, NOT integrity-covered), so the retained hash STILL matches — PlanStore.load SUCCEEDS and the loaded status rides through as ADVISORY. The contract (module INTEGRITY CONTRACT note; Lane A2): a driver MUST re-derive done-ness from a fresh oracle run, never trust the persisted status as proof of completion. REFUSED-vs-ADVISORY: ADVISORY (load succeeds; status is not evidence).
goal: a plan whose completion status was flipped on disk (advisory only, not integrity-covered)

tasks.prompt: build storage — the status fields were flipped on disk (advisory, outside the hash)
